Third-Party Component Notice
============================

Component
---------
cloudflared

Publisher
---------
Cloudflare

Purpose
-------
The mobile_tunnel plugin bundles cloudflared to create temporary Cloudflare Quick Tunnels without requiring users to download the executable separately.

Source
------
Project:
https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared

Release:
https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/tag/2026.5.2

Bundled asset:
https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/download/2026.5.2/cloudflared-windows-amd64.exe

License
-------
cloudflared is licensed under the Apache License 2.0.

The bundled license text is stored at:
vendor/cloudflared/licenses/LICENSE-cloudflared-Apache-2.0.txt

Redistribution Notes
--------------------
- The bundled executable is provided as a third-party binary.
- The plugin does not claim ownership of cloudflared.
- The version, source URL, and SHA256 checksum are recorded in VERSION.txt.
- Keep the license text and this notice with the executable when redistributing the plugin.
